visual_description: In a dimly lit nighttime scene, a man with glasses and a light-colored suit jacket looks up and speaks to another man whose back is to the camera. The man in the suit has a concerned expression. The background is dark, punctuated by out-of-focus streetlights. Chinese subtitles appear at the bottom of the screen, and a watermark is visible in the top right corner. The camera is in a medium close-up, focusing on the man in the suit. A man speaks in a calm, slightly questioning tone, asking in Mandarin, "你好吗？" (Are you okay?). His voice is steady and clear. In the background, a low, tense, and atmospheric musical score plays, creating a feeling of suspense and seriousness. The camera angle shifts slightly, showing more of the group. The man with glasses is now looking down, and another man to the left is partially visible. The man whose back was to the camera is now seen from the side, reaching into a dark briefcase. The group appears to be examining something inside the case. The scene is still dark, with the primary light source coming from off-screen, casting the figures in silhouette. The watermark remains in the top right corner. The camera pulls back to a wide shot, revealing the full
